name: Chicken Scalloppine
recipeInstructions:
1. In a separate pan, sauté mushrooms in 1 tablespoon butter until set aside.
2. In the same pan, sauté garlic in 2 tablespoons butter until light golden in color, then discard the garlic.
3. Add chicken to the pan and sauté until browned.
4. Sprinkle chicken with flour, salt, pepper, sage, and nutmeg.
5. Add onions, white wine, and tomato puree. Cover and cook for about 20 minutes or until tender. Stir several times while cooking.
6. When the chicken is tender, add mushrooms and olives.
7. Cook for an additional 5-7 minutes. If the sauce becomes too thick during cooking, add a bit more white wine to thin it out.
